content.full_text:
2731 Byron Street  
Palo Alto, CA 94306  
(415) 326-2388

May 18, 1990

Ms. Kathryn E. Donovan  
General Counsel  
Fair Political Practices Commission  
428 J Street, Suite 800  
Sacramento, CA 95814

Attn: Ms. Blanca Breeze

RE: No. 90-292, Request of Anthony C. Bennetti, Advice Regarding the Sand Hill Corridor Joint Policy Committee

Dear Ms. Donovan and Ms. Breeze:

Today I delivered the attached letter and documents to Mr. Anthony C. Bennetti, Acting City Attorney of the City of Palo Alto, and requested that he review them to see if he agrees with me that the facts contained therein are relevant to the above referenced case.

I am mailing you a copy today so that you have these facts available as soon as possible, should Mr. Bennetti decide to include them in his request for advice.

I understand that you cannot accept facts from a third party, which is why I have sent these facts to Mr. Bennetti to make a determination as to relevance in his capacity as a governmental official requesting advice from the Fair Political Practices Commission.

Please do not hesitate to contact me if you have any questions.

Sincerely,

Herb Borock

Attachments

P.S. Please notify me if Mr. Bennetti decides to include these facts as part of his request and whether you have extended your deadline for giving advice in this matter. Thanks.
